content:
## System Purpose

Conversations are the source of truth for intent. Everything else is derived.

The system exists because intent is continuously generated through conversation but never persists — it evaporates between sessions. The goal is to close that loop: capture the raw signal, distil it into structured intent, and maintain a living record that future agents can reason against. [[source:811302f6-0be7-435c-b844-910cc9a21b67/5]]

provenance.raw_agent: This reframes everything. The inbox isn't a messaging utility — it's the mouth of the pipeline.
provenance.raw_user: Conversations are the source of truth for intent. Everything else is derived. The system exists because intent is currently generated continuously — through conversation — but never persists. It evaporates between sessions. The goal is to close that loop: capture the raw signal, distil it into structured intent, and maintain a living record that future agents can reason against.
